mapper.select: SELECT PO.PO_ID AS poId, S.SUPPLIER_NAME AS supplierName, RE.EMP_NAME AS requestEmpName, AE.EMP_NAME AS approveEmpName, PO.PO_DATE AS poDate, PO.APPROVE_DATE AS approveDate, PO.TOTAL_AMOUNT AS totalAmount, PO.MEMO AS memo FROM PURCHASE_ORDER PO JOIN SUPPLIER S ON PO.SUPPLIER_ID = S.SUPPLIER_ID JOIN EMPLOYEE RE ON PO.REQUEST_EMP_ID = RE.EMP_ID LEFT JOIN EMPLOYEE AE ON PO.APPROVE_EMP_ID = AE.EMP_ID WHERE PO.STATUS = 'APPROVED' ORDER BY PO.APPROVE_DATE DESC

SELECT POD.PO_DETAIL_ID AS poDetailId, POD.PRODUCT_ID AS productId, P.PRODUCT_CODE AS productCode, P.PRODUCT_NAME AS productName, P.UNIT AS unit, POD.ORDER_QTY AS orderQty, POD.UNIT_PRICE AS unitPrice FROM PURCHASE_ORDER_DETAIL POD JOIN PRODUCT P ON POD.PRODUCT_ID = P.PRODUCT_ID WHERE POD.PO_ID = #{poId} ORDER BY POD.PO_DETAIL_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RECEIVING ( RECEIVING_ID, PO_ID, RECEIVED_EMP_ID, RECEIVING_DATE, STATUS, MEMO, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_RECEIVING.NEXTVAL, #{poId}, #{receivedEmpId}, SYSDATE, 'COMPLETED', #{memo}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO RECEIVING_DETAIL ( RECEIVING_DETAIL_ID, RECEIVING_ID, PRODUCT_ID, LOT_NO, EXPIRY_DATE, RECEIVED_QTY, UNIT_PRICE ) VALUES ( SEQ_RECEIVING_DTL.NEXTVAL, #{receivingId}, #{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{expiryDate}, #{receivedQty}, #{unitPrice} )

INSERT INTO INVENTORY_LOT ( INVENTORY_LOT_ID, PRODUCT_ID, LOT_NO, EXPIRY_DATE, CURRENT_QTY, SAFETY_QTY, LOCATION, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_INVENTORY_LOT.NEXTVAL, #{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{expiryDate}, #{receivedQty}, 0, 'A', 'NORMAL', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO STOCK_MOVEMENT ( MOVEMENT_ID, INVENTORY_LOT_ID, MOVEMENT_TYPE, QTY, BEFORE_QTY, AFTER_QTY, REF_TABLE, REF_ID, CREATED_BY, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_MOVEMENT.NEXTVAL, #{inventoryLotId}, 'IN', #{qty}, 0, #{qty}, 'RECEIVING', #{receivingId}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE PURCHASE_ORDER SET STATUS = 'COMPLETED', UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE WHERE PO_ID = #{poId}
